governanceNote: Any addition or change to token values in actorRole, action, objectRole, contextRole, or ncaSubclass requires increment to ENUM_v1.1 and corresponding increment to fingerprintVersion (CSN_FINGERPRINT_V2). Existing tokens are immutable within a version. No synonyms, no compound tokens except challenged_authority (semantics locked by ACTION_TAXONOMY_CONTRACT.md Section VI), no cross-lane reuse with PRESSURE_ENUM_REGISTRY_V1.
